# Coastal Endurance

> Australian men's skincare brand making Field Oil — a daily barrier maintenance face oil for men with serious outdoor exposure. 7 natural ingredients, 59% active barrier-repair oils, 59% Australian-grown, zero fragrance, zero essential oils.

Field Oil is positioned as equipment maintenance for outdoor-exposed skin. Built for surfers, cyclists, swimmers, tradies, farmers, and outdoor workers who face sun, salt, wind and time. Not anti-aging. Not luxury ritual.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand intro and Field Oil overview.
- [Field Oil Product](/product): Full product page — pricing ($85 AUD / 30ml), one-time purchase, and 12-month subscription (4 bottles for the price of 3).
- [Ingredients](/ingredients): Full breakdown of all 7 ingredients, INCI list, characteristics, storage, and FAQ.
- [About](/about): Why Field Oil exists, the equipment-maintenance philosophy, who it's built for.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact form, wholesale inquiries, response times.
- [Field Team](/field-team): Beta tester program for approved members.
